name: Applied microeconometrics reduced-form methods
prompt: I need 10 essential papers in applied microeconometrics. Focus only on reduced-form causal inference methods — no structural estimation.

special_rules: Should NOT include structural estimation papers like BLP demand estimation or dynamic discrete-choice structural models.

notes_for_graders: Cross-discipline methodological curation. Should ask about PDF download. Decoy test: no structural estimation papers.
